title: ICSI + CODE AI-2026: Paper Abstracts & GCSI Project Briefing Submission Deadline Extended Till Today!
content:
# ICSI + CODE AI-2026: Paper Abstracts & GCSI Project Briefing Submission Deadline Extended Till Today!

Ek important update hai for all researchers and professionals! The organizers of the ICSI + CODE AI-2026 conference have announced an extension for the submission of Paper Abstracts and GCSI Project Briefings.

Here are the key details:

*   **Old Due Date:** The original deadline for submissions was May 15, 2026.
*   **New Due Date:** The deadline has now been extended to **May 31, 2026**. This means submissions are due by the end of today!
*   This extension pertains specifically to the Paper Abstracts and GCSI Project Briefing submissions for the ICSI + CODE AI-2026 event.

Hope this quick update helps you meet the revised deadline!

## Read the Official Document
*   [Download the Official Notification/Circular here](https://innovation-methods.org/ICSI-CODE-AI-2026/)

*Published on: 31 May 2026*
